ModMetaData.name: VRE Insector (HSK/CE Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, Sarg Bjornson — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched standalone version of Vanilla Races Expanded — Insector, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VRE Insector mod content with HSK conventions and Combat Extended patches baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Insector alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
CE patches: - 4 insectoid melee hediffs converted to CombatExtended.ToolCE with proper Sharp/Blunt armor penetration: * VRE_InsectMandibles — Cut, Sharp 0.5 / Blunt 2.0 * VRE_HornAttack — Stab (megaspider horns), Sharp 0.4 / Blunt 2.5 * VRE_RipperBlades — Cut (armor-rending blades), Sharp 0.7 / Blunt 1.5 * VRE_InsectRostrum — Stab (cross-mod, only fires when VFE Insectoid 2 active), Sharp 0.6 / Blunt 2.0
HSK CE armor rescale: - VRE_Insectskin gene (basic carapace) — Sharp 0.27 / Blunt 0.18 → Sharp 4 / Blunt 4 (HSK CE basic carapace tier, matches Saurid scaleskin) - VRE_MineralRichInsectskin hediff (cross-mod, 2 health stages) — rescaled from vanilla CE 0.48/0.26 → 6/4 (low health, cracked) and 0.9/0.52 → 12/8 (full health, between flak and marine)
HSK material rebalance: - VRE_InfestedShipPart_Spawned — bumped to ~50% of HSK vanilla ShipChunk's deconstruct yield (was ~37%): SteelBar 30 + ComponentIndustrial 8 + Wire 8 + InsectJelly 5. Lore-friendly: still less salvageable than clean ship debris because of insectoid biomass takeover, but no longer 3x cheaper than what HSK colonies expect.
No work needed for: AcidBurstSack/ChemfuelSacks (use AnimalBehaviours explosion comps that work under CE), Metapod cocoon mechanics, Insector psychic abilities.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, Sarg Bjornson. HSK/CE conversion + bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC. VFE Insectoid 2 cross-mod patches (InsectRostrum, MineralRichInsectskin) only fire when that mod is active.
